properties.injury_desc: Fishing line stuck around both front flippers and neck. Both flippers necrotic. left flipper nearly missing.

properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: Stranded on mudflats. Fishing line stuck around both front flippers and neck. Both flippers necrotic. left flipper nearly missing. Euthanased after admitting.

properties.injury_desc: PROP STRIKE INJURY. Older injury to left side of animal's head - removal of left eye and partial removal of top beak, leaving bottom beak exposed. Newer injury to right eye, evidence of infection. redness).
MULTIPLE INJURIES TO FLPPERS AND PREDATED. UNKNOWN CAUSE.
